div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in China (Johnson)
div.p: 119. Nanking’s telegram No. 29, April 18, 10 a.m., to Department, and Legation’s 181, April 18, 8 p.m. Unless you perceive objection, in which event please telegraph Department at once, instruct Peck to endeavor to obtain as promptly as possible written statement from Chinese Government confirming implied offer outlined in Nanking’s telegram under reference. Upon receipt of such statement by Peck, its complete text should be submitted to Department by naval radio together with any suggestions or comments which Peck may wish to offer.

In the meantime Department wishes to receive promptly a statement of the Legation’s views in regard to the merits of this latest move of the Chinese Government toward the settlement of its outstanding obligations to American claimants.
